per_format_notes.crushr: recovery accounting is computed from extracted file presence and byte counts; content checksums are not yet validated
per_format_notes.tar+gz: recovery accounting is computed from extracted file presence and byte counts; content checksums are not yet validated
per_format_notes.tar+xz: recovery accounting is computed from extracted file presence and byte counts; content checksums are not yet validated
per_format_notes.tar+zstd: recovery accounting is computed from extracted file presence and byte counts; content checksums are not yet validated
per_format_notes.zip: recovery accounting is computed from extracted file presence and byte counts; content checksums are not yet validated

mapping_report.blast_radius_thresholds: NONE=1.0, LOCALIZED=[0.9,1.0), PARTIAL_SET=[0.5,0.9), WIDESPREAD=(0,0.5), TOTAL=0.0 using recovery_ratio_files
mapping_report.recovered_byte_rule: bytes_recovered sums min(actual_size, expected_size) for each recovered file; missing files contribute zero bytes
mapping_report.recovered_file_rule: a file counts as recovered only when a same-relative-path regular file exists in extraction output; zero-byte files count as recovered when expected size is zero
